fml.menu.mods.info.description.justenoug: Adds a JEI profession browser that shows each villager profession and its matching job-site blocks.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.catalogue: Replaces the NeoForge mod list with a searchable catalogue for viewing mod details, links, filters, favorites, and update status.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.jeed: Adds JEI, REI, and EMI pages that explain status effects, their sources, and their behavior.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.jei: Provides searchable item, block, recipe, and usage lookup for Minecraft and installed mods. Supports recipe transfer, bookmarks, and configurable item management tools.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.jeresourc: Adds JEI pages for resource generation, mob drops, chest loot, village trades, and world-generation information. It only displays information and does not modify the world or loot.
